name: Jest Testing Framework
description: Set up Jest with TypeScript (via ts-jest), Istanbul coverage, module mocking, and a sensible default config. The standard for Node.js testing.

steps.description: Check existing test setup and Node version
Create Jest config with ts-jest preset, coverage thresholds, and moduleNameMapper for path aliases
Add test, test:watch, and test:coverage scripts
Create sample test with jest.fn() mock demonstrating the pattern

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Battle-tested unit testing with TypeScript, mocks, and Istanbul coverage
